title: Intense Savory Filipino Peas Stew
description: A funky and nostalgic Filipino dish featuring peas, this stew is emulsified to perfection and cooked in a cataplana vessel, making it a gluten-free friendly option.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in the cataplana vessel over medium heat.
Add the diced pork belly and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the peas, fish sauce, vinegar, black pepper, and salt, and stir to combine.
Pour in the coconut milk and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let the stew cook, covered, for 20 minutes, or until the peas are tender.
Use an immersion blender to emulsify the stew, or let it cool and emulsify it in a blender.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with chopped green onions or scallions if desired.
